lines.speaker: han_lin
lines.text: Hey, everyone! The New Year School Concert is around the corner. We want to find out what kind of music everyone likes. How about you, Teng Fei?

lines.speaker: teng_fei
lines.text: I love traditional music that tells a story, for example, folk music.

lines.speaker: clarice
lines.text: Really? Folk music is a little old-fashioned to me.

lines.speaker: han_lin
lines.text: So, what kind of music do you like, Clarice?

lines.speaker: clarice
lines.text: Of course it's rock. I like music that I can dance to.

lines.speaker: han_lin
lines.text: What about you, Jack?

lines.speaker: jack
lines.text: Well, to me, rock is too loud. I need something that has a strong rhythm like rap. Wouldn't you agree, Debbie?

lines.speaker: debbie
lines.text: No, in fact, I wouldn't. I just don't get rap.

lines.speaker: han_lin
lines.text: Then what kind of music do you like?

lines.speaker: debbie
lines.text: I prefer music that I can sing along to, so it's pop for me.

lines.speaker: teng_fei
lines.text: Hey, guys! Have you heard the news?

lines.speaker: debbie
lines.text: No. What?

lines.speaker: teng_fei
lines.text: The Chinese Dragon band is going to perform at our New Year School Concert!

lines.speaker: debbie
lines.text: Oh, great!

lines.speaker: jack
lines.text: I love their music!

lines.speaker: clarice
lines.text: Me too! I like the fact that they mix rock, pop, and traditional Chinese music to make a new style.

lines.speaker: debbie
lines.text: Yes, it's amazing to hear the erhu and pipa being played together with the keyboard and electric guitar.

lines.speaker: jack
lines.text: Yeah, I like musicians who are creative.

lines.speaker: clarice
lines.text: So do I! And the lead singer Bob Wu has a voice that I could listen to all day!

lines.speaker: teng_fei
lines.text: Do you think they'll play Horse Racing?

lines.speaker: debbie
lines.text: They should! It's a piece which everyone loves!

lines.speaker: jack
lines.text: Oh, I just remembered!

lines.speaker: clarice
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: jack
lines.text: I've got a T-shirt which has the band's name on the back!

lines.speaker: clarice
lines.text: Cool! You should wear it to the concert!
